expected_deltas.content: Exhausting all 3 payment retry attempts suspends the account and revokes paid feature access
expected_deltas.source_span: If all 3 retry attempts fail, the account is suspended and access to paid features is revoked.

expected_deltas.content: Providing a valid payment method immediately reactivates a suspended account
expected_deltas.source_span: Suspended accounts can be reactivated immediately once a valid payment method is provided.
